The Root · 2007–2014

The Business Club

Zeus. GameOver Zeus. The crew that turned bank fraud into an institution and became the common ancestor of every Russian ransomware brand that followed. Every name below came out of this room.

The Protected is a living record. Each file is updated as new material lands rather than treated as one-and-done. Confidence is graded inside every file: Confirmed, Credible, and Analyst inference.
